headline: Is Devon Energy (DVN) Pricing Make Sense After 65% Gain And Coterra Merger Talk
summary: If you are wondering whether Devon Energy's current share price lines up with its underlying value, this breakdown will help you connect the dots between the stock, the business and what you might be paying for. The shares last closed at US$50.56, with returns of 5.5% over 7 days, 4.1% over 30 days, 33.5% year to date and 65.0% over the past year. This puts recent trading front and center for any valuation discussion. Recent headlines around Devon Energy have focused on its position among US...
